communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting copies of the following public records related to the Michigan Governor's Summer Residence on Mackinac Island:

1. All records reflecting total annual expenditures for the maintenance, repair, renovation, staffing, utilities, and upkeep of the Governor's Summer Residence for fiscal years 2019 through 2025.

2. Any budget line items, appropriations, or internal financial summaries specific to the Governor's Summer Residence for the same period.

3. Records of any private donations received for the residence, including donor names and amounts.

4. Any contracts with third-party vendors or contractors for work performed at the residence during the same period.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jaxen Core
